title: Strip project name from scaffold service, CLI, and API endpoint
implementation_notes: cli/scaffold.ts: remove projectName and boardName from ScaffoldOptions. Only keep workspaceName + workspaceId.
Remove generated project .md and board .md from scaffold output. Keep the empty directory creation for projects/, boards/, columns/, tasks/, agents/, approvals/, audit/, threads/.
cli/relayhq.ts: remove --project-name flag from the init command. Update help text.
app/server/api/vault/init.post.ts: remove projectName from request body and from the scaffoldVault() call.
Update cli/scaffold.test.ts: remove any test assertions about generated project or board files.
No other files should need changing.
acceptance_criteria: scaffoldVault({ vaultRoot, workspaceName }) creates vault/shared/ with one workspace file and empty subdirectories only.
No project, board, or column .md files are generated during init.
`relayhq init --vault-root=X --workspace-name=Y` works; passing --project-name is silently ignored or produces an 'unknown flag' warning.
POST /api/vault/init ignores or rejects projectName in the body without error.
completion_summary: Removed project and board generation from the scaffold, stripped --project-name from the CLI init flow, and updated the init endpoint plus tests for workspace-only initialization.
